summary: $65 cash-like bounty hint exists, but issue is 2015-era broad ARM build/prebuilt infrastructure, 175 comments, high verification burden, no small deterministic PR path.
A-grade direct financial topic, but same-day existing opportunity opp_20260529_119_sbiz_credit_weak_loan_blog already covers 소상공인 정책자금/분할상환 맥락; new item would inflate backlog.

candidate: K-패스 7월 7일 카드정보 업데이트·환급 불이익 체크 글
summary: Official K-패스 site shows card-information update deadline warning, 2026.04.01~09.30 한시 환급률 확대, 다자녀/청년/저소득 환급률, 15회 미만 환급 미지급 rule. Direct monthly money impact and title tension are clear.
Tool idea has utility, but official site already has 예상환급금 계산기. First step should be a reader-facing official-order guide; custom calculator only after traffic/reader questions are measured.
